age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per the norms of the Government of India/IIT (ISM), Dhanbad

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech/M.S./MCA/M.Sc. with GATE or NET qualification
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech/M.S./MCA/M.Sc. with a GATE qualification (in CS, DA, EC, or EE) or NET (in Computer Science and Applications, Electronic Science, and Mathematical Sciences).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the ANRF Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech/M.S./MCA/M.Sc. degree along with a valid GATE or NET qualification in the specified disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the ANRF Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the ANRF Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection process be conducted?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview conducted via video conferencing. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of ANRF Project Associate-I in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of ANRF Project Associate-I is on a contractual basis.
